parameters.content:
## Service Order Fulfillment & SLA Escalation Engine
Version 1.0.0 — Operations

Production-grade order fulfillment orchestrator for service brokerages (skip hire, field services, logistics). Verifies Stripe payment, extracts structured order details with Claude AI, creates CRM records in Freshworks, sends transactional emails via Postmark, assigns a supplier, enforces a 4-hour SLA, auto-escalates missed SLAs to Slack and reassigns to the next available supplier, then logs every outcome to Google Sheets.

Flow: Webhook => Validate Order => Verify Stripe Payment => Payment OK? => Extract with AI => Upsert Customer (Freshworks) => Create Deal => Send Confirmation (Postmark) => Find Supplier => Send Assignment => SLA Wait 4h => Check Deal Stage => Accepted? => Confirm/Escalate => SLA Retry 2h => Final Check => Log Outcome

## Prerequisites
- Stripe account with secret key (for payment verification)
- Freshworks CRM account — API key + domain (subdomain.freshsales.io)
- Postmark account — Server API Token (transactional email stream)
- Slack workspace — Bot Token + #ops-escalations channel
- Google Sheets — OAuth2 credential + pre-created fulfillment log sheet
- Anthropic API key (Claude for order extraction)

Freshworks setup: Go to Admin Settings → API Settings → copy your API key. Suppliers must be CRM contacts tagged 'supplier-available'. Deals need stages: New, Supplier Assigned, Accepted, Escalated, Completed.

## Setup Required
1. Order Webhook — copy webhook URL into your website/checkout backend
2. Verify Stripe Payment — add Stripe Secret Key to the HTTP Request header
3. Extract Order Details — connect Anthropic API credential
4. Upsert Customer Contact — set FRESHWORKS_DOMAIN + FRESHWORKS_API_KEY
5. Create Service Deal — connect Freshworks CRM credential, update stageId for 'New'
6. Send Order Confirmation — add Postmark Server Token, update From address
7. Find Available Supplier — update tag filter to match your supplier tag in Freshworks
8. Send Supplier Assignment — update From address and email template
9. SLA Wait nodes — adjust 4h/2h windows to your SLA policy
10. Alert Slack — connect Slack credential, confirm channel name #ops-escalations
11. Log Outcome — connect Google Sheets, replace YOUR_FULFILLMENT_SHEET_ID

## How It Works
1. Webhook receives new order from checkout with payment_intent_id and customer details
2. Validate Code checks required fields and normalises data (email lowercase, postcode uppercase)
3. Stripe HTTP verifies payment_intent status = 'succeeded' before proceeding
4. Claude AI extracts waste type, skip size, collection address, priority from order notes
5. Customer contact upserted in Freshworks CRM via REST API
6. Service deal created in Freshworks with order value and all custom fields
7. Postmark sends branded order confirmation to customer
8. Freshworks searched for available supplier contacts (tagged supplier-available)
9. Postmark sends supplier assignment request with job details
10. Wait node holds execution for 4 hours (SLA window)
11. Deal stage checked — if Accepted, customer notified and success logged
12. If not: Slack alert fired, next supplier found, reassigned, 2h retry SLA starts
13. Retry check: if accepted → confirm; if not → Slack urgent alert + Escalated deal stage
14. All outcomes (success / retry success / escalated) logged to Google Sheets
Validates required fields, normalises email/postcode, assigns order reference
Verifies payment_intent status = succeeded via Stripe API before processing
Routes to failure path if payment not succeeded — stops order processing immediately
Claude AI parses free-text order notes into a validated structured schema

options.systemMessage: You are an order processing assistant for a service brokerage. Extract structured data from customer order notes with high precision. For skip hire orders: identify skip size (2, 4, 6, 8, 10, 12 yard), waste type (general, construction, garden, commercial, mixed, hazardous), and any site access restrictions. Priority levels: standard = normal orders, urgent = same-day or next-day, emergency = immediate response required. Always output all fields even if some are null.

parameters.content: Creates or updates customer contact in Freshworks CRM via upsert REST endpoint
Creates service deal in Freshworks CRM linked to the customer contact
Sends branded order confirmation email to customer via Postmark
Queries Freshworks for contacts tagged 'supplier-available' — picks the first match
Sends job assignment request to supplier with full order details and acceptance deadline
Holds execution for 4 hours — the primary SLA window for supplier acceptance
Polls Freshworks deal stage to determine if supplier has accepted the job
Routes TRUE if supplier accepted within SLA, FALSE triggers escalation path
Fires Slack alert to ops team with full order context when SLA is missed
Sends reassignment request to next available supplier with escalation context
Holds execution for 2 hours — the retry SLA window after reassignment
Final decision: retry accepted triggers confirmation; failure triggers manual intervention alert
Both SLA attempts failed — urgent Slack alert for immediate manual intervention
